who: restaurant managers in mid-sized restaurants (50-100 seats)
offer: For restaurant managers in mid-sized restaurants (50-100 seats) processing 20-50 maintenance tasks/month, inconsistent maintenance schedules cause equipment failures. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of maintenance schedules.
problem: Inconsistent maintenance schedules for kitchen equipment.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to restaurant managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for restaurant tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry and alert notifications for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing maintenance data
